keyEvents.text: Luke Robinson (Bermuda) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Antigua and Barbuda 1, Bermuda 0. Raheem Deterville (Antigua and Barbuda) right footed shot from outside the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by D'Andre Bishop.
Substitution, Antigua and Barbuda. Josh Parker replaces Jalmaro Calvin because of an injury.
